ranked_movies.title: The Lobster

ranked_movies.title: Requiem for a Dream
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently cited as a profoundly traumatic and impactful film that is intentionally disturbing with a deep message, making it a top recommendation for those seeking a powerful experience.

ranked_movies.title: The Act of Killing
ranked_movies.reason: Multiple mentions as a mind-blowing and unsettling documentary that challenges viewers' perceptions of history, morality, and reality.

ranked_movies.title: Three Identical Strangers
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended documentary described as shocking and mind-blowing, often listed alongside other top documentaries for its surprising and impactful story.

ranked_movies.title: The Killing of a Sacred Deer
ranked_movies.reason: Strongly recommended as a logical next step after 'The Lobster', noted for its bizarre and anger-inducing yet compelling narrative from the same director.

ranked_movies.title: Happiness

ranked_movies.title: Irreversible
ranked_movies.reason: Noted for its intense and unsettling nature, with technical details about its sound design contributing to its traumatic impact, making it a top recommendation for disturbing films.

ranked_movies.title: Kids
ranked_movies.reason: Highlighted for its burned-in-your-memory ending and disturbing portrayal of teenage life, making it a frequently recommended film for those seeking impactful experiences.

ranked_movies.title: Logan
ranked_movies.reason: Praised as a masterpiece in the superhero genre with brutal action and compelling story, unexpectedly exceeding expectations and becoming a benchmark for quality.

ranked_movies.title: Galaxy Quest
ranked_movies.reason: Unexpectedly fantastic comedy with a perfect cast, often mentioned as a film that surpassed low expectations and became a beloved classic.

ranked_movies.title: Lost in Translation
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended for its beautifully written human moments and poetic motion, capturing grief, love, and awkwardness without explosions or twists.

ranked_movies.title: Good Will Hunting

ranked_movies.reason: Analyzed in depth for its critique of creative men avoiding responsibility, maintaining its status as a frequently discussed and interpreted classic.
